utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Uh ... oh ... okay . Uh ... oh ... okay . I know what you all are thinking . But Chandler is in Yemen !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah ! No that is what I was thinking .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: So I am asking you please , take a moment before you judge me .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh ! Okay ! You , Mister Right Place at the Right Time , call me !

emotion_cause.span: 5_You , Mister Right Place at the Right Time , call me !
